title: Grape and Jamaican Leaf Delight
description: A unique, sweet, and savory dish combining the flavors of Jamaica and fresh grapes, wrapped in fragrant leaves.
instructions: Rinse the grape leaves and pat dry.
In a bowl, mix together grapes and jerk seasoning.
Place a grape leaf on a flat surface, with the stem end facing you.
Place a spoonful of the grape mixture in the center of the leaf.
Fold the stem end over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the leaf into a neat package.
Repeat with the remaining leaves and filling.
Place the rolls in a baking dish and drizzle with buttery drizzle.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the leaves are tender.
